name: luly-v0-1-4
description: Author Luly flows (academies, courses, marketing campaigns, waitlists, interactive proposals) end-to-end from a single natural-language prompt. Ships 14 skills plus the validator / assembler scripts they call. Version-suffixed plugin name lets you see at a glance which version is loaded — e.g. Skill(luly-v0-1-4:luly-icon).
